scripts.generate-icon: magick src-tauri/icons/icon.svg -background none -resize 512x512 src-tauri/icons/icon.png && magick src-tauri/icons/icon.svg -background none -resize 256x256 src-tauri/icons/icon.ico && magick src-tauri/icons/icon.svg -background none -resize 512x512 src-tauri/icons/icon.icns
scripts.build: npm run generate-icon && tsc && vite build
